description:
Epic tracker for the CPS-in-clif execution model.

Spec: docs/cps-in-clif.md (single source of truth).

Children:
- ABI/codegen arm: fz-cps.1 .. fz-cps.6
- GC/runtime arm:  fz-cps.GC.1 .. fz-cps.GC.6

Acceptance:
- All children closed.
- The four §8 fixtures (tail_recursion, higher_order, closure_typed_captures, concurrency_ping_pong) pass on JIT, interpreter, and AOT.

Non-goals (see §11): generational GC, preemption, multi-cont, off-heap binaries, stack-allocated conts.
title: fz-cps epic: CPS-in-clif execution model
